query_text: What Redis maxmemory policies evict keys from the entire keyspace using least recently used?
expected_answer: allkeys-lru evicts LRU keys from the full keyspace when memory is full.

query_text: How do I configure Istio VirtualService weighted routing for a canary release with 10% traffic?
expected_answer: Use two HTTP routes with weights 90 and 10 pointing at stable and canary subsets.

query_text: What happens to write commands when Redis uses noeviction and memory is full?
expected_answer: Writes return errors while reads may still succeed.

query_text: List the main PostgreSQL VACUUM tuning parameters and their default values.
expected_answer: autovacuum_vacuum_scale_factor defaults to 0.2; autovacuum_analyze_scale_factor defaults to 0.1.

query_text: What is the difference between volatile-lru and allkeys-lru in Redis eviction?
expected_answer: volatile-lru only evicts keys that have an expire set; allkeys-lru can evict any key.

query_text: Explain gRPC deadline propagation across service mesh sidecars.
expected_answer: Deadlines are carried in grpc-timeout headers and enforced by proxies along the path.
